_note: ReposPage enrichment for one locale, keyed by paper id (short uuid). The sibling .<other>.json holds the translation. Fields not set here fall back to papers.json.

page.lede: Every paper that ships with software publishes that software here. The site itself is in the list. No proprietary lock-in, no blind trust required.

dehkj.description: Open-source toolset for pan-Canadian benchmarking of legislation, regulation, and policy. Lets a government compare its statutes against peer jurisdictions and identify where it is an outlier, where it is duplicative, where it is silent.

p7p2k.description: The generic harness, plus an Alberta.ca adaptation as a worked example. Skill files, hook layer, opinionated stack. Enterprise-grade Hello World that solves the most complex first-mile challenges.

akle0.description: Recursive, iterative scanner for an enterprise GitHub estate. Maps the technical estate, cybersecurity posture, and human estate (top contributors by language and ministry).

offjm.description: From analysis to synthesis. Operates at the ministry scale across hundreds of systems and proposes a modular, reusable, government-owned compute architecture for that ministry.

bxvjn.description: The downloadable JSON of the repeatable, codified business functions of government, extracted from the actual code that runs today. System-agnostic and ministry-agnostic.

ln4lv.description: The secure sandboxed environment that allows agents to work iteratively without degrading the security posture. Where parallel models compete on the same problem.

k20ck.description: Project-management system that replaces Jira-style tooling with a point-based scoring engine. Tracks hundreds of human workers and thousands of agents across 600+ themes.

tn0nj.description: The Anti-Drift Harness reference site. Skills, hooks, standards, evals, walker, tickets, anti-drift agent.
